Careers

Build Your Career
With Us

We're growing fast and looking for driven, detail-oriented professionals who want to do meaningful outdoor work. Competitive pay, real career growth, and a team that values your contribution.

Why Join Lucky Landscapes

More Than Just a Job

At Lucky Landscapes, we invest in our people. You'll join a professional team with clear growth paths, hands-on training, and the tools you need to do your best work.

Professional Team Culture

Work alongside skilled professionals in a supportive, growth-oriented environment where your ideas and expertise are valued.

Career Advancement

Develop new skills, earn certifications, take on leadership roles, and advance your career as the company grows.

Rewarding Work

Spend your days outdoors creating spaces that make homeowners proud — and see the tangible results of your craftsmanship every day.

Apply Now

Start Your
Application

Submit your information and we'll review your application within a few business days. We're looking forward to learning about your experience.
